title: EU AI Act — obligations for high-risk systems (documentation, testing, human oversight)

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Left-to-right path-to-market flow for a high-risk system: provider obligations (risk management, technical documentation, data governance, testing/robustness) → conformity-assessment gate (pass/fail) → placed on market → ongoing duties (record-keeping/logging, human oversight, transparency to deployers). Shows the 'before, then ongoing' split and the gate.
artifact_plan.suggested_profile_signals: multi-part title; Core Concepts spine is a discrete ~8-obligation list + provider/deployer split; examples per obligation but no procedure section; 5.7 carried tier framing so 5.8 expands one slice (not deep/system-level).
artifact_plan.budget_note: Standard accepted; running 60/90 after 5.8. Steer naturally-light remaining topics (India MEITY 5.12, wrap-up 5.13) to atomic to land near 90.

depth_signals: Standard — ~8-obligation list + provider/deployer split, expands the high-risk slice of 5.7's tiers, no procedure; reading ~1200-1600w; diagram = path-to-market flow with conformity gate.
